exampleSentences: Anh thấy tóc em hôm nay cắt khá ngắn rồi đấy.
Bài văn này hơi ngắn nên em cần viết thêm vài câu nữa.
Chị thích mặc váy ngắn vào mùa hè vì cảm thấy mát mẻ hơn.
exampleSentencesTranslated: I see your hair is cut quite short today.
This essay is a bit short so you need to write a few more sentences.
She likes wearing short skirts in the summer because it feels cooler.
notes:
ngắn = short (in length, height, or time).

It describes things that don’t last long or aren’t long in size: hair, clothes, time, distance, text, etc. In Vietnamese, adjectives come after the noun: tóc ngắn, thời gian ngắn, quãng đường ngắn. It can also stand alone after “thì / là” to describe something.

Opposite: dài (long).  
Comparative: ngắn hơn (shorter).

definitions.vi: Có chiều dài ngắn; không dài.

notes_md:
**ngắn** = short (in length, height, or time).

It describes things that don’t last long or aren’t long in size: hair, clothes, time, distance, text, etc. In Vietnamese, adjectives come **after** the noun: *tóc ngắn, thời gian ngắn, quãng đường ngắn*. It can also stand alone after “thì / là” to describe something.

Opposite: **dài** (long).  
Comparative: **ngắn hơn** (shorter).
